requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Safety — EV Charging Equipment (General) — Denmark
requirement_topic.zh: 低压安全——电动汽车充电设备（通用）——丹麦
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓安全——電動汽車充電設備（通用）——丹麥

summary.en: EV charging equipment placed on the EU/Denmark market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU, ensuring it is designed and manufactured to be safe when correctly installed and maintained. Equipment must meet the Essential Safety Requirements (Annex I) covering protection against electric shock, insulation, overcurrent/overtemperature protection, and clearances. Harmonised standard EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Mode 1–4 conductive charging, AC and DC, general requirements) provides a presumption of conformity. In Denmark, Sikkerhedsstyrelsen (sik.dk) is the market surveillance authority enforcing LVD and other product safety directives for EV charging equipment.
summary.zh: 在欧盟/丹麦市场销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合低压指令2014/35/EU，确保其在正确安装及维护条件下安全运行。设备须满足附件I基本安全要求，涵盖防触电、绝缘、过流/过温保护及电气间隙。协调标准EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4传导充电，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在丹麦，安全技术局（sik.dk）是执行低电压指令和其他产品安全指令的市场监督机构，适用于电动汽车充电设备。
summary.zht: 在歐盟/丹麥市場銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU，確保其在正確安裝及維護條件下安全運行。設備須滿足附件I基本安全要求，涵蓋防觸電、絕緣、過流/過溫保護及電氣間隙。協調標準EN IEC 61851-1:2019（模式1–4傳導充電，交直流，通用要求）可推定符合指令。在丹麥，安全技術局（sik.dk）是執行低電壓指令和其他產品安全指令的市場監督機構，適用於電動汽車充電設備。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-1:2019 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

summary.en: China commonly references GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements), which is technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporates national deviations. It is enforced under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB/T 18487.1 testing and certification by a Chinese CNAS-accredited lab is NOT recognised as equivalent to EN IEC 61851-1 testing under the EU LVD conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国常见参考标准为GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关但含有国家偏差，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会监督执行。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 18487.1出具的检测及认证，不被欧盟LVD合格评定程序直接认可为等同。
summary.zht: 中國常見參考標準為GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關但含有國家偏差，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會監督執行。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 18487.1出具的檢測及認證，不被歐盟LVD合格評定程序直接認可為等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements (SAMR/SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build an EU conformity file against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-1:2019 testing as evidence for presumption of conformity. Existing Chinese GB/T 18487.1 test reports do not automatically substitute because scope, deviations, connector assumptions, and documentation differ. A Notified Body is not mandatory for LVD; manufacturer self-declaration with a Technical File is the normal route. Documentation gap: EU Declaration of Conformity, CE marking, and EU/Danish-language technical instructions are all required. The technical file should reflect the 230/400 V 50 Hz Denmark configuration.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕低压指令基本安全要求建立欧盟合规技术文件，并可采用EN IEC 61851-1:2019检测作为推定符合性的证据。现有GB/T 18487.1检测报告不会自动替代，因为范围、偏差、接口假设及文件要求不同。LVD通常不强制要求公告机构；制造商自我声明加技术文件是常规路径。文件差距：需提供欧盟符合性声明、CE标志及欧盟/丹麦语技术说明书。技术文件应反映丹麦230/400 V 50 Hz配置。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞低壓指令基本安全要求建立歐盟合規技術文件，並可採用EN IEC 61851-1:2019檢測作為推定符合性的證據。現有GB/T 18487.1檢測報告不會自動替代，因為範圍、偏差、接口假設及文件要求不同。LVD通常不強制要求公告機構；製造商自我聲明加技術文件是常規路徑。文件差距：需提供歐盟符合性聲明、CE標誌及歐盟/丹麥語技術說明書。技術文件應反映丹麥230/400 V 50 Hz配置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/35/EU and CE marking before EU/Denmark market placement. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is voluntary harmonised-standard evidence for presumption of conformity; alternative technical solutions are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the LVD essential safety requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 18487.1 compliance required under SAMR framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory for EU/Denmark market access. EN IEC 61851-1:2019 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can grant presumption of conformity for general EV conductive charging; it is not the legal obligation itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.1 certification does not by itself satisfy the EU conformity assessment pathway; EU evidence against the LVD requirements is needed. Danish-language instructions are required for Denmark installations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据LVD 2014/35/EU，CE标志为进入欧盟/丹麦市场的强制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用于电动汽车传导充电通用要求推定符合性的自愿协调标准，并非法律义务本身。中国GB/T 18487.1认证本身不满足欧盟合格评定路径；仍需提供针对LVD要求的欧盟证据。丹麦安装须提供丹麦语说明书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據LVD 2014/35/EU，CE標誌為進入歐盟/丹麥市場的強制要求。EN IEC 61851-1:2019是可用於電動汽車傳導充電通用要求推定符合性的自願協調標準，並非法律義務本身。中國GB/T 18487.1認證本身不滿足歐盟合格評定路徑；仍需提供針對LVD要求的歐盟證據。丹麥安裝須提供丹麥語說明書。

requirement_topic.en: DC Charging Station Safety — EV Conductive Charging — Denmark
requirement_topic.zh: 直流充电站安全——电动汽车传导充电——丹麦
requirement_topic.zht: 直流充電站安全——電動汽車傳導充電——丹麥

summary.en: DC charging stations (Mode 4, off-board chargers) placed on the EU/Denmark market must comply with the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU where within scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station) is a current product standard that may be used as technical evidence and, where cited as harmonised, gives presumption of conformity; it is not itself the mandatory legal obligation. Key technical topics include isolation monitoring, interlock systems, control pilot functions, maximum voltage/current ratings, and communication protocols for DC supply. In Denmark, DC fast chargers must be equipped with CCS Combo 2 connectors (see connector fragment) and support ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC communication for EU compliance.
summary.zh: 投放欧盟/丹麦市场的直流充电站（模式4，非车载充电机）在适用范围内须符合低压指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第23部分：直流电动汽车充电站）是现行产品标准，可作为技术证据使用；在被列为协调标准时，可产生推定符合性，但其本身并非强制性法律义务。核心技术主题包括绝缘监控、互锁系统、控制引导功能、最大电压/电流额定值及直流供电通信协议。在丹麦，直流快充站须配备CCS Combo 2接口（见接口部分），并支持ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC通信以满足欧盟合规要求。
summary.zht: 投放歐盟/丹麥市場的直流充電站（模式4，非車載充電機）在適用範圍內須符合低壓指令2014/35/EU。EN IEC 61851-23:2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第23部分：直流電動汽車充電站）是現行產品標準，可作為技術證據使用；在被列為協調標準時，可產生推定符合性，但其本身並非強制性法律義務。核心技術主題包括絕緣監控、互鎖系統、控制導引功能、最大電壓/電流額定值及直流供電通訊協議。在丹麥，直流快充站須配備CCS Combo 2接口（見接口部分），並支持ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC通訊以滿足歐盟合規要求。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (current edition, supersedes 2014)
ISO 15118 — Vehicle to grid communication interface (Plug & Charge protocol stack)
DIN 70121 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV

summary.en: China's DC charging station domestic equivalent is GB/T 18487.3-2001 (AC/DC electric vehicle charging station — the only published Part 3 of the 18487 series; note: a GB/T 18487.3-2015 does not exist). The current DC system standard is GB/T 18487.5-2024 (DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 connector). The DC coupler standard is GB/T 20234.3-2023 (supports up to 1500 V / 800 A). CQC or CNAS certification to these Chinese standards is not accepted under the EU LVD CE marking pathway.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电站国内对应标准为GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流电动汽车充电站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一发布版本；注：GB/T 18487.3-2015并不存在）。现行直流系统标准为GB/T 18487.5-2024（适用于GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充电系统）。直流耦合器标准为GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依据上述中国标准获得的CQC或CNAS认证，在欧盟LVD CE标志合格评定路径下不被接受。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電站國內對應標準為GB/T 18487.3-2001（交直流電動汽車充電站——GB/T 18487系列第3部分的唯一發布版本；注：GB/T 18487.3-2015並不存在）。現行直流系統標準為GB/T 18487.5-2024（適用於GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充電系統）。直流耦合器標準為GB/T 20234.3-2023（支持最高1500V/800A）。依據上述中國標準獲得的CQC或CNAS認證，在歐盟LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑下不被接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.3-2001 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — AC/DC electric vehicle charging station (only published edition; no 2015 revision exists)
GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 (current DC system standard)
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (supersedes 2015 edition)

gap.en: DC charging stations exported to Denmark should be assessed against the LVD essential safety requirements and may use EN IEC 61851-23:2023 testing as presumption-of-conformity evidence where applicable. Particular attention is needed for: (1) CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) connector compliance vs. Chinese GB/T connector — a hardware redesign requirement; (2) ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC communication protocol support for CCS2 vehicle communication; (3) isolation monitoring requirements per European grid topology; (4) Denmark's 230/400 V supply voltage vs. China's 220/380 V in DC station input specifications; (5) Danish-language safety labels and instructions required for Denmark installations.
gap.zh: 出口丹麦的直流充电站应针对LVD基本安全要求进行评估，并可在适用时采用EN IEC 61851-23:2023检测作为推定符合性证据。重点关注：（1）CCS2（组合充电系统2型）连接器合规性与中国GB/T连接器的差异——需进行硬件重新设计；（2）CCS2车辆通信须支持ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC通信协议；（3）欧洲电网拓扑下的绝缘监控要求；（4）直流充电站输入规格中丹麦230/400 V供电电压与中国220/380 V的差异；（5）丹麦安装须提供丹麦语安全标签和说明书。
gap.zht: 出口丹麥的直流充電站應針對LVD基本安全要求進行評估，並可在適用時採用EN IEC 61851-23:2023檢測作為推定符合性證據。重點關注：（1）CCS2（組合充電系統2型）連接器合規性與中國GB/T連接器的差異——需進行硬件重新設計；（2）CCS2車輛通訊須支持ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC通訊協議；（3）歐洲電網拓撲下的絕緣監控要求；（4）直流充電站輸入規格中丹麥230/400 V供電電壓與中國220/380 V的差異；（5）丹麥安裝須提供丹麥語安全標籤和說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: CE marking under Directive 2014/35/EU where the charger is within LVD scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary technical standard that may support presumption of conformity where harmonised/cited; alternatives are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates compliance with the Directive. CCS2 connector and ISO 15118 communication are mandatory for EU/Denmark public DC fast-charging market access.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 18487.5-2024 is the current DC charging system standard; CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC charging stations require CE marking under the applicable EU legislation including LVD where in scope. EN IEC 61851-23:2023 is a voluntary product standard used as technical evidence or presumption-of-conformity support where harmonised; it is not mandatory in itself. Chinese GB/T 18487.3 certification is not accepted as an EU conformity assessment substitute. A significant hardware gap exists where Chinese DC stations use GB/T connectors incompatible with EU CCS2 practice, and ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC communication support is required for CCS2 vehicle-charger interaction. Denmark-specific 230/400 V voltage and Danish-language documentation must be addressed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 直流充电站须依据适用欧盟法律取得CE标志，其中在LVD范围内的产品须符合低压指令。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作为技术证据或在协调时用于推定符合性的自愿产品标准，并非自身强制。中国GB/T 18487.3认证不能替代欧盟合格评定。若中国直流充电站使用与欧盟CCS2实践不兼容的GB/T连接器，则存在重大硬件差距，且CCS2车辆-充电机互动须支持ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC通信。须解决丹麦特定的230/400 V电压及丹麦语文件问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 直流充電站須依據適用歐盟法律取得CE標誌，其中在LVD範圍內的產品須符合低電壓指令。EN IEC 61851-23:2023是可作為技術證據或在協調時用於推定符合性的自願產品標準，並非自身強制。中國GB/T 18487.3認證不能替代歐盟合格評定。若中國直流充電站使用與歐盟CCS2實務不相容的GB/T連接器，則存在重大硬件差距，且CCS2車輛-充電機互動須支持ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC通訊。須解決丹麥特定的230/400 V電壓及丹麥語文件問題。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation Safety — EV Charging in Buildings (IEC 60364-7-722 / DS/HD 60364-7-722) — Denmark
requirement_topic.zh: 建筑内电动汽车充电电气安装安全（IEC 60364-7-722 / DS/HD 60364-7-722）——丹麦
requirement_topic.zht: 建築內電動汽車充電電氣安裝安全（IEC 60364-7-722 / DS/HD 60364-7-722）——丹麥

summary.en: EU member-state electrical installation law and grid/installer rules govern the building-side circuits supplying EV charging points. IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722 provide the commonly adopted technical installation route covering protective measures (RCD type B or A+DC detection), wiring, earthing, and load management. These standards apply to the building-side installation infrastructure, not the charger product itself. In Denmark, DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018 is the adopted standard. Exported EV chargers should be compatible with these installation requirements so they can be accepted by Danish electricians, DSOs, and permitting authorities.
summary.zh: 欧盟成员国电气安装法律及电网/安装方规则规范电动汽车充电点的建筑侧供电回路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技术安装路径，涵盖保护措施（B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、布线、接地及负荷管理。这些标准适用于建筑侧安装基础设施，而非充电设备产品本身。在丹麦，采用标准为DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018。出口欧盟/丹麦的充电设备应与相关安装要求兼容，以便获得丹麦电工、配电运营商和许可机构接受。
summary.zht: 歐盟成員國電氣安裝法律及電網/安裝方規則規範電動汽車充電點的建築側供電迴路。IEC 60364-7-722 / HD 60364-7-722提供常用的技術安裝路徑，涵蓋保護措施（B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、布線、接地及負荷管理。這些標準適用於建築側安裝基礎設施，而非充電設備產品本身。在丹麥，採用標準為DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018。出口歐盟/丹麥的充電設備應與相關安裝要求相容，以便獲得丹麥電工、配電運營商和許可機構接受。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60364-7-722:2018 — Low-voltage electrical installations — Part 7-722: Requirements for special installations or locations — Supply of electric vehicles
DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018 — Danish national adoption of HD 60364-7-722 (CENELEC harmonised document)
Danish electrical installation regulations and DSO grid-connection rules

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation primarily through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). These cover site design and installation but differ from IEC 60364-7-722 / DS/HD 60364-7-722 in RCD type requirements, earthing system assumptions (TN-S vs. Chinese practice), and load management protocols. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Danish installation standards.
summary.zh: 【未经核实】中国主要通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜，由住房和城乡建设部负责管理。上述标准涵盖场地设计及安装，但在RCD类型要求、接地系统假设（TN-S与中国实践的差异）及负荷管理协议方面与IEC 60364-7-722 / DS/HD 60364-7-722存在差异。中国安装文件不被接受作为符合丹麦安装标准的证据。
summary.zht: 【未經核實】中國主要通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜，由住房和城鄉建設部負責管理。上述標準涵蓋場地設計及安裝，但在RCD類型要求、接地系統假設（TN-S與中國實踐的差異）及負荷管理協議方面與IEC 60364-7-722 / DS/HD 60364-7-722存在差異。中國安裝文件不被接受作為符合丹麥安裝標準的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD) (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (confirmed to exist; enforced by MOHURD/MIIT)

gap.en: DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018 is Denmark's adopted installation standard — it governs fixed wiring and protection devices at the building side, not the charger product itself. However, exported EV chargers should declare compatibility with Type B RCDs or incorporate internal DC fault protection to allow Type A RCDs under Danish installation practice. A charger that requires installation conditions not achievable under Danish electrical codes will fail field acceptance by Danish licensed electricians. Chinese charger datasheets often omit compatibility statements expected by Danish installers and DSOs. Danish-language installation instructions are expected for products installed in Denmark.
gap.zh: DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018是丹麦采用的安装标准——规范建筑侧固定布线及保护装置，而非充电设备产品本身。但出口丹麦的充电设备应依据丹麦安装实践声明与B型RCD兼容，或内置直流故障保护以允许使用A型RCD。若充电设备要求的安装条件在丹麦电气规范下无法实现，将无法通过丹麦持证电工的现场验收。中国充电设备产品规格书通常未包含丹麦安装商及配电运营商所期望的兼容性声明。在丹麦安装的产品须提供丹麦语安装说明书。
gap.zht: DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018是丹麥採用的安裝標準——規範建築側固定布線及保護裝置，而非充電設備產品本身。但出口丹麥的充電設備應依據丹麥安裝實務聲明與B型RCD相容，或內置直流故障保護以允許使用A型RCD。若充電設備要求的安裝條件在丹麥電氣規範下無法實現，將無法通過丹麥持證電工的現場驗收。中國充電設備產品規格書通常未包含丹麥安裝商及配電運營商所期望的相容性聲明。在丹麥安裝的產品須提供丹麥語安裝說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation sits in Danish electrical installation law (Stærkstrømsbekendtgørelsen), grid codes and permitting/inspection rules. DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018 is the voluntary/nationally adopted technical standard commonly used to demonstrate accepted installation practice; product compatibility is a practical market requirement. Danish-language installation instructions are practically mandatory for acceptance by Danish installers.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 under MOHURD (GB 50966-2014 and GB/T 51313-2018 confirmed as published standards enforced by MOHURD; check SAC for any 2023-2025 revisions)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018 governs building-side installation practice in Denmark. EV chargers exported to Denmark should be compatible with the RCD and earthing requirements expected by Danish installers and DSOs. This is distinct from product-level CE marking under LVD, but non-compatibility can block field installation. Chinese installation standards (GB 50966 / GB/T 51313) are not substitutes. Provide Danish-language installation instructions for Denmark deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018规范丹麦建筑侧安装实践。出口丹麦的充电设备应与丹麦安装商及配电运营商所期望的RCD和接地要求兼容。这与产品层面依据LVD取得CE标志不同，但不兼容会阻碍现场安装。中国安装标准（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。丹麦部署须提供丹麦语安装说明书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] DS/HD 60364-7-722:2018規範丹麥建築側安裝實務。出口丹麥的充電設備應與丹麥安裝商及配電運營商所期望的RCD和接地要求相容。這與產品層面依據LVD取得CE標誌不同，但不相容會阻礙現場安裝。中國安裝標準（GB 50966 / GB/T 51313）不可替代。丹麥部署須提供丹麥語安裝說明書。
